name: Loadable

unions.name: Loadable
unions.comment:
A `Loadable` value is either empty, failed, or succeeded, and may be loading
or not

unions.name: Value
unions.comment: The value of a `Loadable`, aside from its loading state

values.name: andMap
values.comment:
Apply a function to the value of a `Loadable`

    succeed (\a -> a + 1) |> andMap (succeed 1) --> succeed 2
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e (a -> b) -> Loadable.Loadable e b

values.name: andMapWith
values.comment:
Apply a function to the value of a `Loadable`, combining the errors.

NOTE: This is intended to be used in a pipeline, with errors accumulating left
to right _in the pipeline_ not in the order of arguments to the function. See
the examples.

    succeed (\a -> a ++ "b")
        |> andMapWith (++) (succeed "a")
        --> succeed "ab"

    fail "a"
        |> andMapWith (++) (fail "b")
        --> fail "ab"
values.type: (e -> e -> e) -> Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e (a -> b) -> Loadable.Loadable e b

values.name: andThen
values.comment:
Should match the semantics of the Monad instance for

```haskell
ExceptT e (MaybeT (Writer Any))
```

    succeed 1 |> andThen (\a -> succeed (a + 100)) --> succeed 101

    succeed 1 |> andThen (\_ -> fail "error") --> fail "error"

    fail "error" |> andThen (\_ -> loading) --> fail "error"

    notAsked |> andThen (\_ -> loading) --> notAsked

    loading |> andThen (\_ -> notAsked) --> loading
values.type: (a -> Loadable.Loadable e b) -> Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e b

values.name: combineMap
values.comment:
Combine a list of `Loadable` values

    combineMap succeed [ 1, 2, 3 ]
    --> succeed [ 1, 2, 3 ]

    let
        odd n =
            modBy 2 n == 1
        failIfOdd n =
            if odd n then
                fail (String.fromInt n)
            else
                succeed n
    in
    combineMap failIfOdd [ 1, 2, 3 ]
    --> fail "1"
values.type: (a -> Loadable.Loadable e b) -> List.List a -> Loadable.Loadable e (List.List b)

values.name: combineMapWith
values.comment:
Combine a list of `Loadable` values with a function that combines the errors

    combineMapWith (\x _ -> x) == combineMap

    let
        odd n =
            modBy 2 n == 1
        failIfOdd n =
            if odd n then
                fail (String.fromInt n)
            else
                succeed n
    in
    combineMapWith (++) failIfOdd [ 1, 2, 3 ] --> fail "13"
values.type: (e -> e -> e) -> (a -> Loadable.Loadable e b) -> List.List a -> Loadable.Loadable e (List.List b)

values.name: fail
values.comment: A failed value that is not loading
values.type: e -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: fromMaybe
values.comment:
Convert a `Maybe` into a `Loadable`

    fromMaybe (Just 1) --> succeed 1

    fromMaybe Nothing --> notAsked
values.type: Maybe.Maybe a -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: fromResult
values.comment:
Convert a `Result` into a `Loadable`

    fromResult (Ok 1) --> succeed 1

    fromResult (Err "error") --> fail "error"
values.type: Result.Result e a -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: isLoading
values.comment:
Check if the `Loadable` is loading

    isLoading loading --> True

    isLoading notAsked --> False
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Basics.Bool

values.name: loading
values.comment: An empty value that is loading
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: map
values.comment:
Map the value of a `Loadable`

    map (\a -> a + 1) (succeed 1) --> succeed 2

    map (\_ -> 0) (fail "error") --> fail "error"
values.type: (a -> b) -> Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e b

values.name: notAsked
values.comment: An empty value that is not loading
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: succeed
values.comment: A successful value that is not loading
values.type: a -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: toLoading
values.comment:
Set loading to `True`

    toLoading loading --> loading

    toLoading notAsked --> loading
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: toMaybe
values.comment:
Convert a `Loadable` to a `Maybe`

    toMaybe (succeed 1) --> Just 1

    toMaybe notAsked --> Nothing
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Maybe.Maybe a

values.name: toMaybeError
values.comment:
Convert a `Loadable` to a `Maybe` of the error type

    toMaybeError (fail "error") --> Just "error"

    toMaybeError notAsked --> Nothing
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Maybe.Maybe e

values.name: toNotLoading
values.comment:
Set loading to `False`

    toNotLoading loading --> notAsked

    toNotLoading notAsked --> notAsked
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Loadable e a

values.name: unwrap
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> { value : Loadable.Value e a, isLoading : Basics.Bool }

values.name: value
values.comment:
Get the value of a `Loadable`

    value (succeed 1) --> Success 1

    value notAsked --> Empty
values.type: Loadable.Loadable e a -> Loadable.Value e a

values.name: withDefault
values.comment:
Get the success value out of `Loadable` or a fallback if it's not the success case

    withDefault 0 (succeed 1) --> 1

    withDefault 0 notAsked --> 0
values.type: a -> Loadable.Loadable e a -> a
